title: Command injection via user input in subprocess call
diff:
diff --git a/utils.py b/utils.py
--- a/utils.py
+++ b/utils.py
@@ -5,6 +5,10 @@ def ping_host(host):
-    result = subprocess.run(["ping", "-c", "1", host], capture_output=True, text=True)
+    # User can inject commands:  example.com; rm -rf /
+    result = subprocess.run(f"ping -c 1 {host}", shell=True, capture_output=True, text=True)
     return result.stdout

ground_truth.description: Command injection via shell=True with unsanitized user input
